setup.intro: First-time setup — takes under a minute. Everything stays on this machine.
setup.networkHint: You can change this later in the Admin dashboard.
setup.tunnelHint: Uses Cloudflare's free tunnel to expose this node behind NAT. Must keep running for the node to be reachable.
setup.exposureTitle: How do other users reach this node?
setup.exposureSub: Pick how the outside world connects to your node — you can always change this later.
setup.choiceTunnelD: Generates a free *.trycloudflare.com URL on demand. Needs cloudflared installed.
setup.choiceManualD: Enter a static public URL I already have (direct IP, domain, Tor hidden service).
setup.choiceSkipD: Register without a public URL. Other nodes won't reach yours until you add one.
setup.manualHint: Must be reachable from the internet — this is what appears in the controller registry.
setup.reviewSub: Double-check the values. Secrets will be generated automatically.
setup.chooseExposure: Pick one of the cards above
setup.tunnelNeedsGen: Click "Generate tunnel" first or pick another option
setup.manualUrlRequired: Enter your public URL, or pick a different option
setup.errorCtrlUrl: Controller URL is required for Custom mode
setup.snsNotResolved: vortexx.sol is not resolvable yet. Refresh or pick Custom.
setup.tunnelStepSub: A free Cloudflare tunnel exposes localhost:9000 as a public HTTPS address. It costs nothing, no account needed.
setup.manualStepSub: Paste the URL at which this node is already reachable from the outside — a static IP, your own domain, a Tor hidden service, anything accessible over HTTP(S).
setup.skipStepSub: Your node will still register and can reach other peers, but no one will be able to reach you until a public URL is configured.
setup.skipBullet1: You can still chat inside your own rooms and contacts you invited.
setup.skipBullet2: Other nodes will know you exist, just not how to reach you.
setup.skipBullet3: Add a tunnel or URL any time in Admin → Controller.
setup.idChoiceSub: Your 24-word phrase is the master key for this node. It derives both the signing key (authenticates your node to the network) and your Solana wallet (receives operator rewards). Same 24 words = same node — so you can move to a new machine just by re-entering them.
setup.idCreateD: Generate a fresh 24-word phrase. You'll be shown the words once — write them down.
setup.idRestoreD: Recover an existing node — paste your 24 words to restore the same identity and wallet on this machine.
setup.idCreateWarn: Write these words on paper or store in a password manager. Anyone with this phrase controls your node and its wallet. We can't show it again.
setup.idRestoreHint: Type or paste the 24 words separated by spaces. Order matters — same phrase will restore the same node identity and wallet.
setup.confirmSaved: I saved the phrase — I understand it cannot be recovered if lost.

admin.shareHint: Share this with other Vortex users to let them invite your node.
admin.publicUrlDesc: This is the address the setup wizard produced for this node (cloudflared tunnel / manual URL). Give it to peers who want to reach you.
admin.dbSetupDesc: Installs PostgreSQL locally, creates a fresh cluster under the wizard's state directory, adds a vortex role + database with your password, and writes DATABASE_URL into the node's .env. Restart the node afterwards.
admin.trafficGraphsDesc: Rolling 2-minute window, sampled every 5 seconds. All data is in-memory and local — nothing leaves this machine.
admin.backupDesc: The node encrypts its database with a key derived from your 24-word seed and uploads the opaque blob to the controller. The controller cannot decrypt it. Restoring on any machine with the same seed recovers your data.
admin.aiMasterOffDesc: Installs Ollama in one click and unlocks model setup. Without AI, this node's discovery weight is reduced by 15%.
admin.aiMasterOnDesc: Turning off drops this node's discovery weight by 15%
admin.aiWeightHint: Controller applies -15% discovery weight to nodes with AI disabled. Running a local model gives users a better UX and you get more traffic.
admin.aiInstallDesc: macOS: brew install ollama. Linux: wizard will print the command to run in a terminal (we don't auto-run curl|sh for safety).
admin.aiModelDesc: Recommended: qwen3:8b (~5 GB, strong at rephrase/summarize).
admin.settingsHint: All of the node's .env keys. Most changes require a node restart to take effect. Secrets (JWT_SECRET, etc.) live under the Security tab.
admin.obsProfilerDesc: Rolling window (last 500 samples per endpoint). P50/P95/P99 in ms.
admin.opsJobsDesc: Background jobs — cron backup, auto-prune, resource watchdog, uptime ping. Intervals persist across restarts.
admin.opsPinHint: Disables the auto-update banner — manual upgrades only.
admin.earningsWalletDesc: Rewards land here on-chain once the payout contract is live. This address is derived from your 24-word seed — losing the seed means losing access to the funds.
admin.earnStakeDesc: The register fee (1 SOL, non-refundable) is paid once per node to anchor identity and discourage sybils. Stake is optional — it multiplies your share of the rewards pool.
admin.earnHow1: 70% of platform premium revenue goes into the rewards pool.
admin.earnHow3: Uptime acts as a multiplier — full credit at 99%+, zeroed below 50%.
admin.earnHow4: Payout is automatic once the smart contract is deployed; amounts below are estimates.
admin.metaSafeDesc: These are raw counters — no content, no IPs, no per-user breakdowns. Never transmitted anywhere outside this machine.
admin.subject: Subject
